detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use hwicap driver.

sect1.title: xhwicap_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XHwicap driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver in interrupt mode.

sect1.title: xhwicap_low_level_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XHwicap driver directly. This example shows the usage of the low-level macros and functions of the hwicap driver.

sect1.title: xhwicap_read_config_reg.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XHwicap driver directly. This example prints out the values of all the configuration registers in the FPGA.

sect1.title: xhwicap_read_frame_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XHwicap driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver to read one frame from the device using the polled mode.

sect1.title: xhwicap_testapp_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XHwicap driver directly. This example shows the usage of the hwicap driver.
